summary: A Go-based CLI tool named 'Ralph' that integrates with MCP to run, detect, and validate infrastructure tests, featuring Goss migration and a dashboard.
concerns: Reporter state leak across watch cycles required a recent fix
Uncommitted changes (10 modified, 6 untracked) suggest instability
Monorepo handling logic mixed with core runner concerns
Bootstrap phase indicated by recent commits
suggestions: Commit or stash the 16 uncommitted files to stabilize the branch
Add integration tests for the MCP handlers
Isolate monorepo detection logic from the runner execution path
Document the Goss migration mapping rules
